sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_users (U_ID INT, U_NAME VARCHAR(255), U_AGE INT, U_EMAIL VARCHAR(255) NULL);
INSERT INTO test_users (U_ID, U_NAME, U_AGE, U_EMAIL) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com'), (2, 'Bob', 25, NULL), (3, 'Charlie', 28, 'charlie@example.com');
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM test_users WHERE U_AGE > 20 GROUP BY U_NAME HAVING COUNT(U_ID) > 1 ORDER BY U_NAME;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM test_users WHERE U_AGE = (SELECT MAX(U_AGE) FROM test_users WHERE U_EMAIL IS NOT NULL) OR U_NAME LIKE 'B%';
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID || '') OR U_EMAIL) FROM test_users GROUP BY U_AGE ORDER BY U_AGE DESC;

SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) AS user_info FROM test_users WHERE (U_age < 20 OR U_EMAIL IS NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_users T2 WHERE T2.U_ID = test_users.U_ID AND T2.U_NAME = 'Charlie') GROUP BY U_NAME;
CREATE TABLE additional_users (U_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, U_NAME VARCHAR(255), U_JOIN_DATE DATE);
INSERT INTO additional_users (U_ID, U_NAME, U_JOIN_DATE) VALUES (1, 'Dave', '2020-01-01'), (2, 'Eve', NULL);

SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U.U_NAME, A.U_NAME)) FROM test_users U JOIN additional_users A ON U.U_NAME = A.U_NAME OR U.U_ID = A.U_ID WHERE U.U_AGE IS NOT NULL OR A.U_JOIN_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY U.U_NAME, A.U_NAME HAVING COUNT(U.U_ID) > 0 ORDER BY U.U_NAME;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_CONCAT_AGG (vector (U_NAME, U_ID)) FROM test_users WHERE (U_ID = 1 OR U_ID = 2) AND (U_EMAIL IS NULL OR U_NAME IN (SELECT U_NAME FROM additional_users WHERE U_JOIN_DATE IS NULL));
